segments.text: That was absolutely inescapable without tech!
segments.original_text: さばきしなければ絶対かわせなかった
ニュートラルで暴れて

segments.text: Even with Teshi's Samus flipping the ledge advantage,
segments.original_text: 崖展開を入れ替えるテシのサムスだが

segments.text: Takes a deep recovery so the bomb doesn't hit!
segments.original_text: ボムからの攻撃は当たらないよう深めの復帰

segments.text: But bomb into charge shot and dash attack!
segments.original_text: だがボムからチャージショット ダッシュアタック
上必殺技巻き込んでいく

segments.text: If that was a fair, that could be stock!
segments.original_text: あーこれ空前だったら撃墜するかもしれません

segments.text: Orange is the one in trouble?
segments.original_text: オレンジ色は逆に危険か

segments.text: Charge shot to forward tilt connects!
segments.original_text: だがここはチャージショットから横強決まる

full_text: That was absolutely inescapable without tech! Gets back! Mashing in neutral! Even with Teshi's Samus flipping the ledge advantage, Back to neutral! Takes a deep recovery so the bomb doesn't hit! But bomb into charge shot and dash attack! Up B gets caught! Recovers the situation! If that was a fair, that could be stock! Good percentage! Orange is the one in trouble? Charge shot to forward tilt connects!
